What We Offer
SERVICES &
PRICING

Every job is unique — these are rough starting estimates. Text us for a fast, free exact quote with no obligation.

01
Driveway & Walkway
Complete pressure wash stripping oil stains, dirt, and discoloration from concrete or pavers.
~$100–150
Starting estimate
02
Patio, Pool Deck & Tile
Concrete, pavers, or tile cleaned and restored. Removes mold, algae, and years of buildup — tiles pop like new.
~$140–220
Starting estimate
03
Fence Washing
Wood or vinyl fencing cleaned top to bottom — restores original color and adds instant curb appeal.
~$100–160
Starting estimate
04
House Siding
Soft-wash or pressure wash for all siding types. Safe for paint, stucco, vinyl, and wood — no damage, no streaks.
~$200–350
Starting estimate
05
Roof Soft Wash
Low-pressure cleaning eliminates moss, algae, and black streaks without lifting or damaging shingles.
~$250–400
Starting estimate
06
Full Property Package
Driveway, patio, walkways, fencing — the whole exterior in one visit. Best value for a complete refresh.
~$450–650
Starting estimate
